abilities.name: Master of Disguise
abilities.description: does not change your form, it just alters your faction making you friendly to pretty much all cities and villages. My BAR RGE gets set at about 1000 for all the evil cities like Nariak and Grobb, except for Ogguk. I don't know if it's a glitch, but no matter what illusion I use, I cannot get friendly with Ogguk (even using Ogre form). MoD CAN stack with disguises as long as you cast it after you cast the form. So if you have master of disguise, then use the Ogre form, you can't coach to Forkwatch. But if you cast the Ogre form then cast MoD, you are free to run all through FW as an Ogre with the guards as friendly as can be.
